description: This Kotlin source file defines the MainViewModel class responsible for managing UI state and user authentication operations in an Android application. It handles login, lock/unlock, logout, and calling a protected API endpoint, interfacing with authentication and network components. It also maintains a status log for UI feedback.

classes.name: MainViewModel
classes.description: A ViewModel class that drives the main UI, managing user authentication states and actions, interfacing with AuthManager and ApiClient, and maintaining a status log for UI display.

methods.name: login
methods.description: Performs a demo login via a mock API; on success, transitions the session to a locked state requiring user verification.

methods.name: lock
methods.description: Locks the current session while tokens remain stored; can be triggered with a reason.

methods.name: unlock
methods.description: Unlocks the session after successful biometric or device credential verification.

methods.name: callProtected
methods.description: Calls a protected API endpoint, demonstrating network call handling and token attachment.

methods.name: logout
methods.description: Clears stored tokens and sets authentication state to logged out.

methods.name: clearLog
methods.description: Clears the internal status log used for UI feedback.
